description: Style Note  We like our clothes to make a statement. Make a casually confident one with this simple and well fitted top from tokyo talkies. Pair it with jeans or shorts and wear a comfortable pair of flip flops to carry off the look completely.  Product Description  Blue top with a round neck, short sleeves with elasticated cuffs, tucks and button detail on the front and elasticated hem with drawstrings on the left sideMaterial and Care  100% Viscose  Wash separately using a mild detergent  Do not bleach and drip dry  Use warm iron  Size and Fit  Regular fit  The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
